svg.title: SGPO v2 Co-Evolutionary Optimization Framework
svg.desc: Algorithm flowchart showing the SGPO v2 framework: start, input, parallel initialization of SFOA and DOA populations, a main generational loop with shared fitness evaluation, co-evolutionary updates, FGO intervention, global best update, loop decision, output, and end, with a legend at the bottom left.
svg.text: MAIN LOOP · Generation g = 1 to G
Compute Matrix F[i,j] via Nested CV
Perturb top-10% to escape local optima
